title: trichodium rubrum
intro: Trichodium rubrum, also known as Red Hair Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trichodium rubrum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and promoting expectoration of mucus. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
